projects.description: Built a microservices REST API backend with Flask, deployed on AWS EC2 with basic IAM roles
Developed a web scraper in Python that collected data and stored results in PostgreSQL
Led redesign of a React component library, improving render performance by 40% using memoization
Built and maintained a Node.js backend API with JWT auth serving 10k+ daily active users
Trained a sentiment analysis classifier using scikit-learn on a Kaggle dataset, achieved 82% accuracy
Built a data cleaning pipeline in Python that processed CSV exports and loaded results into PostgreSQL
